items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Status controls for provisioning and deprovisioning flows', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as resource creation and booking processes, without mentioning status controls. Therefore, it is unclear if this requirement has been satisfied or if there is a gap.
